name: bookmarket-raycast
title: Bookmarket
description: Add and search Bookmarket bookmarks from Raycast.
author: eric-jy-park

commands.name: search-bookmarks
commands.title: Search Bookmarks
commands.description: Search Bookmarket bookmarks through the backend search index.

preferences.name: apiBaseUrl
preferences.title: API Base URL
preferences.description: Use the API origin or /api/v1 root. Local example: http://localhost:8080

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: API Token
preferences.description: Bookmarket API token with bookmarks:read for search and bookmarks:write for adding bookmarks.
